evidence_records.raw_value: Reuters (same photos, still in circulation): Formal blazer + matching trousers confirmed at NATO summit.
evidence_records.notes: Evidence age: 9 days. Photo evidence is durable — timestamp reflects original publication.

evidence_records.raw_value: BBC analysis piece: 'The distinction between a blazer and a suit jacket is subtle but meaningful in fashion. A true suit is cut from the same fabric bolt. Without close inspection, the Zelenskyy photos are inconclusive on this point.'
evidence_records.notes: Not a named resolution source but raises legitimate definitional question. 5 days old.

evidence_records.raw_value: X/Twitter poll (52K votes): 'Is Zelenskyy wearing a suit?' — YES 68%, NO 32%. High engagement but self-selected audience.
evidence_records.notes: Social signal only. Not a resolution source. Shows public perception leans YES.

evidence_records.raw_value: YES token crashed from $0.65 to $0.35. Large NO positions opened by addresses linked to UMA whale clusters. Pre-resolution selling pressure.
evidence_records.notes: Anomalous price movement against photo evidence. Whale positioning ahead of UMA vote.

evidence_records.raw_value: Chainlink-compatible image metadata feed: ambiguous formal-attire classification signal.
evidence_records.notes: Added for oracle-lock compatibility in current protocol.

evidence_records.extracted_text: AP photo gallery from NATO Summit in The Hague (June 24, 2025) includes Zelenskyy in formal dark outfit.
evidence_records.content_summary: Multiple AP images show Zelenskyy in matching dark blazer/trousers style formal attire.
evidence_records.notes: Publicly accessible gallery page as image evidence source index.

evidence_records.extracted_text: Getty editorial page for Zelenskyy at NATO Summit, The Hague, June 23, 2025.
evidence_records.content_summary: High-resolution editorial images indicate coordinated formal attire; supports suit-like classification.
evidence_records.notes: Editorial photo source page (licensing-restricted direct image).

evidence_records.extracted_text: Reuters NATO summit live/report page with Reuters photo wire images from The Hague.
evidence_records.content_summary: Reuters visuals from summit context used as corroborating image evidence for attire interpretation.
evidence_records.notes: Article page contains Reuters images/captions; used as source reference.
